result_message:
### Standalone Patient App - Full Access

[Follow this link to authorize with the SMART server](https://inferno-qa.healthit.gov/reference-server/oauth/authorization?response_type=code&client_id=SAMPLE_CONFIDENTIAL_CLIENT_ID&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Finferno-qa.healthit.gov%2Fsuites%2Fcustom%2Fsmart%2Fredirect&scope=launch%2Fpatient+openid+fhirUser+offline_access+patient%2FPatient.rs+patient%2FAllergyIntolerance.rs+patient%2FCarePlan.rs+patient%2FCareTeam.rs+patient%2FCondition.rs+patient%2FCoverage.rs+patient%2FDevice.rs+patient%2FDiagnosticReport.rs+patient%2FDocumentReference.rs+patient%2FEncounter.rs+patient%2FGoal.rs+patient%2FImmunization.rs+patient%2FLocation.rs+patient%2FMedication.rs+patient%2FMedicationDispense.rs+patient%2FMedicationRequest.rs+patient%2FObservation.rs+patient%2FOrganization.rs+patient%2FPractitioner.rs+patient%2FPractitionerRole.rs+patient%2FProcedure.rs+patient%2FProvenance.rs+patient%2FQuestionnaireResponse.rs+patient%2FRelatedPerson.rs+patient%2FServiceRequest.rs+patient%2FSpecimen.rs&state=a441e853-7103-47f3-a8cf-f9d5db8e8ad7&aud=https%3A%2F%2Finferno-qa.healthit.gov%2Freference-server%2Fr4&code_challenge=aKxXryTNzH5ja-cE9ilM6O6nnM88iUSkvSB9Uj3ZrdA&code_challenge_method=S256).

Tests will resume once Inferno receives a request at
`https://inferno-qa.healthit.gov/suites/custom/smart/redirect` with a state of `a441e853-7103-47f3-a8cf-f9d5db8e8ad7`.
